message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor black
skinparam classHeaderBorderThickness 1
skinparam classHeaderAlignment center
skinparam classAttributeFontColor black
skinparam classMethodFontColor black
skinparam classMethodFontStyle plain
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam classAttributeAlignment left
skinparam classMethodAlignment left
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0

interface "IUserService" as IUserService {
    + Create(user:User) : User
    + Update(userParam:User) : void
}

class "UserService" as UserService {
    - «readonly» _userRepository : IUserRepository
    + UserService(userRepository:IUserRepository)
    + Create(user:User) : User
    + Update(userParam:User) : void
}

UserService --|> IUserService

@enduml
